data.title: Boston Globe to Host Second Annual Working Mothers Summit
data.description: Don't miss out on the opportunity to participate in the second annual Working Mothers Summit by The Boston Globe on March 26. This event will feature industry leaders, activists, and Globe journalists discussing important topics. Registration is available at globe.com/events. The summit aims to provide support and insight to working mothers and caregivers, addressing the challenges they face. Mark your calendars and secure your spot now for this informative event.

data.title: Natracare Launches when we… A Collective Movement for Health, Access and Change
data.description: A new initiative lasting one year is encouraging communities to engage in open dialogue, advocate for change, demand improvements, and empower themselves collectively. The initiative, launched in Chicago on March 12, 2026, aims to address issues surrounding health, dignity, and care that have typically been kept quiet or considered private burdens. Through this program, individuals are urged to come together to address these important topics.

data.title: 9-Year-Old Shark Tank Founder Builds $2M Beverage Brand by Creating New Morning Ritual for Kids
data.description: A year since its appearance on Shark Tank, the startup founded by a father-son duo has grown to be featured in over 400 retail stores. The company is poised to surpass $2M in annual revenue and is establishing a unique category of functional beverages designed for children. This progress marks a significant milestone for the business as it continues to make strides in the market. The development comes as the company gains momentum following its initial exposure on national television.

OIL SHOCK LIFTS U.S. INFLATION OUTLOOK — GOLDMAN Goldman Sachs raised its U.S. inflation forecast and cut its 2026 growth outlook, warning that higher oil prices linked to the Iran conflict are the main economic risk. The bank expects Brent crude to average $98 in March–April,

data.title: MindWalk Holdings Corp. Reports Q3 Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Austin, Texas-based MindWalk Holdings Corp. (Nasdaq: HYFT), a Bio-Native AI company specializing in biologics discovery and AI-driven drug development, announced their financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, ending January 31, 2026. The company reported a revenue of $4.2 million for Q3, showing a significant 52 percent growth from $2.7 million in Q3 fiscal 2025. This marks the third consecutive quarter with year-over-year revenue growth for MindWalk. The Q3 Fiscal 2026 Earnings Call is scheduled for today at 10:30 AM Eastern Time.

data.title: 1 in 5 Homeowners With a Mortgage Could Save Money By Refinancing–But Few Are Taking the Plunge
data.description: In Seattle, a recent report from Redfin, the real estate brokerage powered by Rocket, revealed that 19.8% of U.S. homeowners with a mortgage have the potential to save money by refinancing to a lower rate. This percentage marks a significant increase from just 7% seen a year earlier and is the highest share in over four years. The calculations were based on an average mortgage rate of 6.08% recorded so far this year. Homeowners are considered to be "in the money" for refinancing if their current mortgage rate is at least 50 basis points higher than prevailing rates.
Company reports 50% revenue growth in Q1 2026.

data.title: ABnet Expands Infrastructure Powerhouse to Meet Exponential Demand for AI Workloads
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel - March 12, 2026 - ABnet Communication Ltd., a prominent provider of cloud services, has unveiled a major enhancement in its service offerings tailored to meet the growing demand for Artificial Intelligence (AI) worldwide.

data.title: Sci-Fi Novel "Eleven Elements" Earns Critical Praise for Its Vision of a Future Without War
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on March 12, 2026, early reviews are hailing a novel for its ambitious portrayal of humanity's future, with critics describing it as "the impressive beginning to a sprawling sci-fi series." As global tensions and conflicts impact world affairs, this book has garnered positive feedback for its visionary approach.

data.title: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of Climate Global's Climate-Resilient REIT Index ETF (CLIM)
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Oklahoma City, Exchange Traded Concepts (ETC) announced the launch of the Climate-Resilient REIT Index ETF (ticker: CLIM) in collaboration with Climate Global. ETC, known for its progressive ETF solutions, expressed enthusiasm about the partnership, aiming to offer investors a new opportunity in the climate-resilient sector. This move demonstrates ETC's commitment to innovation and sustainability in the financial market. The ETF, focusing on real estate investment trusts, is designed to provide exposure to companies resilient to climate-related risks.

data.title: XCath Secures $30 Million Series C to Improve Global Outcomes in Neurovascular Care
data.description: Houston-based medical device company XCath has recently revealed that it has successfully raised $30 million in Series C funding. This latest funding round, co-led by Crescent Enterprises and Dr. Fred Moll, Chairman of the XCath Board of Directors, has brought the total raised by the company since its establishment to $92 million. These funds are intended to further support XCath in its mission to introduce the world's first commercially-viable endovascular robot to the market, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation in neuro-endovascular surgical robotics.

data.title: Urban One Inks Multi-Year Expansion with Rickey Smiley; Sets 5-Year Renewal of Syndicated Morning Show and Launch of New Video Podcast Series "Rickey Smiley On The Spot" via Urban One Podcast Network
data.description: In Silver Spring, Maryland on March 12, 2026, a collaboration between Urban One and Rickey Smiley, a Marconi Award-winning radio host, comedian, and author, is set to expand further. The partnership aims to utilize Urban One's extensive multimedia platform to enhance Smiley's international presence. This strategic move is pivotal in scaling Smiley's reach across various media channels.
Oragenics starts Phase IIA clinical trial at multiple sites.

data.title: SEALSQ Highlights Urgency of Post-Quantum Security at Cantor Quantum Security Event in New York
data.description: On March 12, 2026, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) revealed that their CEO, Carlos Moreira, attended the Cantor Quantum Security Event in New York. SEALSQ specializes in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products. The event was a platform for experts, investors, and tech leaders to address cybersecurity threats from quantum computing.

data.title: TransCelerate to Advance Industry Dialogue on Patient-Centered Innovation, AI and Real-World Evidence at PHUSE US Connect 2026
data.description: In Philadelphia on March 12, 2026, an event will feature keynotes and panel sessions discussing AI-enabled translational safety, real-world evidence integration, and clinical enterprise modernization. TransCelerate BioPharma, a nonprofit organization focused on enhancing health, will lead the discussions. This event aims to address crucial topics in the medical field and facilitate collaboration among industry experts. Attendees can expect to gain insights into the latest advancements in healthcare technology and strategies for optimizing clinical processes.

data.title: As Gas Prices Rise, ARKO Highlights “Fueling America’s Future” With Stackable Savings Up to $2.50 Off Per Gallon
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, as of March 12, 2026, ARKO Corp. (Nasdaq: ARKO), a prominent Fortune 500 entity and a major player in the convenience store sector in the U.S., is implementing the Fueling America’s Future program. Through this initiative, registered fas REWARDS® members have the opportunity to accumulate fuel discounts of up to $2.50 per gallon on eligible in-store transactions. This means that customers could potentially save up to $50 when filling up a 20-gallon tank (additional savings subject to state limitations).

data.title: IONOS and Bocada Announce Strategic Partnership to Deliver Integrated Cloud Storage and Backup Oversight for Modern IT and MSP Customers
data.description: IONOS and Bocada have collaborated to introduce an enhanced backup solution for Managed Service Providers, helping alleviate the common backup challenges. The partnership aims to offer a simplified, efficient backup process to MSPs by incorporating AI technology. This upgrade is designed to cater to the needs of small and medium-sized businesses and the public sector. The development was announced on March 12, 2026 in Seattle. The initiative aims to address the ongoing issues faced by MSPs, making backup management more streamlined and reliable.

data.title: Leviathan Metals Announces Sale of Timor Gold Project
data.description: Leviathan Metals Corp., a mining company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, announced the successful sale of its entire ownership stake in the Timor Gold Project. The project, spanning 11,663 hectares, was held by Leviathan's subsidiary, Leviathan Gold Australia. The agreement, finalized on January 12, 2026, involved the transfer of ownership to Au Gold Corp. for an undisclosed amount. Leviathan Metals Corp.'s stock trades as LVX on the TSXV, LVXFF on the OTC, and 0GP on the FSE, while Au Gold Corp. trades on the TSX under the symbol AUGC.

data.title: OpenWay and UnionPay International Expand Global Cooperation to Deliver Full UPI Product Support on Way4
data.description: In a recent announcement, OpenWay, a renowned provider of digital payment solutions, in collaboration with UnionPay International (UPI), a major player in the payment network industry, revealed an extension of their partnership. This initiative aims to offer comprehensive assistance for UnionPay cardholders globally. The partnership between the two entities is significant as it merges OpenWay's expertise in digital payment software with UPI's vast network, benefiting a large number of UnionPay card users worldwide.
